---
title: "About"
toc: false
---

I'm **Fer**, a data scientist with a passion for exploring data and building things.

<!-- Add your bio here -->

### Interests

- Data analysis & visualisation
- Python, pandas, and the pydata ecosystem
- <!-- Add your interests -->

### Get in touch

- GitHub: [fer-at-sea](https://github.com/fer-at-sea)
- <!-- Add other contact info -->
